content.text: No `tests/support/` yet. Idioms vary (findByTitle vs option-content selector, some type-to-search). Let me see the remaining sites to design one flexible helper:

input.command:
cd /Users/arijit/Coding/Python/DataQ/frontend
for spec in "tests/components/RunNowPanel.test.tsx:108:135" "tests/components/TriggersPanel.test.tsx:76:100" "tests/components/SamplePolicyPanel.test.tsx:92:135" "tests/components/SharePanel.test.tsx:92:122"; do
  f=$(echo $spec|cut -d: -f1); a=$(echo $spec|cut -d: -f2); b=$(echo $spec|cut -d: -f3)
  echo "===== $f ($a-$b) ====="; sed -n "${a},${b}p" $f
done

content.text: These idioms vary (open+pick vs open+assert vs search-type). I'll extract `selectOption` for the common **open-and-pick** action (both `title` and option-content `text` matching) and adopt it in the 4 files that do exactly that — Results, ImportSuiteDrawer, RunNowPanel, TriggersPanel. The open-only and search-type sites stay. Create the helper:

git commit -q -m "test(frontend): shared selectOption antd Select helper (#197)

Extract selectOption(user, option, { index, by }) into tests/support/antd.ts —
open the Nth combobox and pick an option by title or option-content text — and
adopt it in the open-and-pick sites across Results / ImportSuiteDrawer /
RunNowPanel / TriggersPanel. The coupling to antd's internal
.ant-select-item-option-content class now lives in one place. Open-only asserts
and search-type flows keep their bespoke idioms.

Refs #197
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>"
